title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth
description: A dynamic event list grows under memory pressure and loses its only pointer when resizing fails. Learners cumulatively produce amortized vector with failure invariants through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.
Invalidate or rebase all interior pointers and aliases when realloc may move storage.
Choose bounded geometric growth from amortized cost, overflow, maximum capacity, and memory-pressure evidence.
